The square of any number is greater than or equal to zero.
The negative of the square of any number is less than or equal to zero.
x^2+2x+7=(x+1)^2+6. \\text{ For all } x, \\text{ we have } (x+1)^2 \\geq 0 \\text{ and so } (x+1)^2+6 \\geq 6
-x^2-2x-7=-(x+1)^2-6. \\text{ For all } x, \\text{ we have } -(x+1)^2 \\leq 0 \\text{ and so } -(x+1)^2-6 \\leq -6
